message.crynicite.crynicite_scissorblade: !WARNING! Do not use this item or any of it's other items while in the first hotbar slot, it will cause a glitch and you will lose your item!
tooltip.crynicite.scissorblades.tooltip: The conjoined power of Cryseum and Cinicite.
tooltip.crynicite.rightscissor.tooltip: The power of Cinicite in your hands.
tooltip.crynicite.leftscissor.tooltip: The power of Cryseum in your hands.
tooltip.crynicite.katana.tooltip: A sword enhanced by the power of Cinicite to grant more range.
tooltip.crynicite.greathammer.tooltip: The shocking force of Cryseum harnessed into one hammer.
tooltip.crynicite.cleaversword.tooltip: The force of Crynicite runs well through this.
